## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and why is it needed? Link any issue with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Specification amendment (changes SIM-STD-0001:2026)

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer quality` passes locally (lint, Pint, deptrac, PHPStan core + shell, PHPUnit).
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests; the core conformance suite still passes.
- [ ] The change respects the functional-core boundary (no I/O, clock, or framework in `src/Core`).
- [ ] Public API and configuration changes are reflected in `docs/`.
- [ ] No AI/assistant attribution in commits or this PR.
